response: {"Q0":"I liked the way it was designed, it can be very difficult to identify the sounds that repeat when you hear so many, they all start to sound very similar apart from the ones that are very distinctive. I adjusted my volume to 25 percent and then plugged my headphones in and unknown to me when I plugged them in the volume went up so I got a loud blast of music in the calibration section but that was my own fault. I think it was well designed and cannot think of any improvements except for maybe being able to select the options by pressing keys on the keyboard instead of clicking a button might but useful but otherwise I thought it was excellent. Thank you. "}
